Defines a weak function stub for enabling light interaction.

# Purpose
This file is a C header file that declares a function [`light_enable_interaction`](<#light_enable_interaction>). The function is defined with the `WEAK` attribute, which suggests that it can be overridden by other definitions with the same name in different translation units. The function is currently implemented as an empty function, indicating that it does not perform any operations. The inclusion of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The file also includes another header file, `util/attributes.h`, which likely contains the definition for the `WEAK` attribute.
